revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[hy:Ժամացույց (Ֆաբերժեի ձու)]][[mk:Часовник (Фабержеово јајце)]][[uk:Годинник (яйце Фаберже)]] [[File:Ժամացույց (Ֆաբերժեի ձու).jpg|thumb]] '''"Clock"''' (Russian: ''Часы'') is a jeweled egg created by the master jeweler '''Mikhail Perkhin''' under the supervision of '''{{ill|Peter Carl Fabergé|en|Peter Carl Fabergé|qid=Q189762|1=Peter Carl Fabergé}}''' in '''1903''' at the '''{{ill|House of Fabergé|en|House of Fabergé|qid=Q2567352|1=House of Fabergé}}'''.<ref name=":0">{{Cite web|title=Карл Фаберже{{!}}Пасхальные шедевры (7). Обсуждение на LiveInternet - Российский Сервис Онлайн-Дневников|url=https://www.liveinternet.ru/users/ludiko/post218112432|access-date=2019 թ․ մայիսի 26|website=www.liveinternet.ru}}</ref>
Today, the "Clock" Fabergé egg is part of a '''private collection''' in '''Moscow, Russia'''.<ref name=":1">{{Cite web|title=Matt & Andrej Koymasky - Fabergé Other Eggs 11|url=http://andrejkoymasky.com/liv/fab/o11/fab11o.html|access-date=2019 թ․ մայիսի 26|website=andrejkoymasky.com}}</ref>
== Description: == The "Clock" Fabergé egg is made of '''{{ill|Bavenite|en}}<ref name=":2">{{Cite web|title=Часы яйцо Фаберже 1903|url=https://faberge-eggs.info/clock_egg_1903.html|url-status=dead|archive-url=https://web.archive.org/web/20190526092345/https://faberge-eggs.info/clock_egg_1903.html|archive-date=2019 թ․ մայիսի 26|access-date=2019 թ․ մայիսի 26|website=faberge-eggs.info}}</ref>''' and is decorated with '''cast, embossed, and ornamental silver'''. A '''round clock face''' is embedded in the surface of the egg,<ref name=":3">{{Cite web|title=Часы - яйцо Фаберже|url=http://eggs.zhukovich.ru/faberzhe/faberzhe.shtml?egg=Chasy|access-date=2019 թ․ մայիսի 26|website=eggs.zhukovich.ru}}</ref> with '''Roman numerals'''. The dial is encircled by a '''silver frame''', from which silver decorative elements extend. The egg rests on '''three silver legs'''.<ref name=":3" />
== A surprise == The surprise is the clock mechanism in the jeweled egg <ref name=":1">{{Cite web|title=Matt & Andrej Koymasky - Fabergé Other Eggs 11|url=http://andrejkoymasky.com/liv/fab/o11/fab11o.html|access-date=2019 թ․ մայիսի 26|website=andrejkoymasky.com}}</ref> .
=== History === The "Clock" Fabergé egg was created in '''Saint Petersburg<ref name=":2" />''' at the '''House of Fabergé''' in '''1903''', crafted by master jeweler '''Mikhail Perkhin'''.<ref name=":0" /> The identity of its first owner remains unknown. In '''2003''', it was put up for auction at the '''"Gelos" auction house'''.<ref name="Независимая3">{{Cite web|title=Независимая газета|url=http://www.ng.ru/collection/2003-11-28/22_toplot.html|access-date=2014 թ․ հուլիսի 13|website=Топ-лотом будут «часы-яйцо» (28.11.2003)|publisher=ng.ru|language=}}</ref> <ref name="newsru3">{{Cite web|title=newsru.Культура|url=http://www.newsru.com/cinema/21nov2003/gelos.html|access-date=2014 թ․ հուլիսի 13|website=В Москве будет продан с аукциона пасхальный сувенир Фаберже — «Часы-яйцо» (21.11.2003)|publisher=newsru.com|language=}}</ref> Today, it remains in a '''private collection in Moscow, Russia'''. ---- *
== Notes: == {{Reflist}}
[[uk:%D0%93%D0%BE%D0%B4%D0%B8%D0%BD%D0%BD%D0%B8%D0%BA (%D1%8F%D0%B9%D1%86%D0%B5 %D0%A4%D0%B0%D0%B1%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%B6%D0%B5)]] [[mk:%D0%A7%D0%B0%D1%81%D0%BE%D0%B2%D0%BD%D0%B8%D0%BA (%D0%A4%D0%B0%D0%B1%D0%B5%D1%80%D0%B6%D0%B5%D0%BE%D0%B2%D0%BE %D1%98%D0%B0%D1%98%D1%86%D0%B5)]]
[[hy:%D4%BA%D5%A1%D5%B4%D5%A1%D6%81%D5%B8%D6%82%D5%B5%D6%81 (%D5%96%D5%A1%D5%A2%D5%A5%D6%80%D5%AA%D5%A5%D5%AB %D5%B1%D5%B8%D6%82)]] {{wikidata link|Q17355814}} [[Category:1903 works]] [[Category:History of Russia]] [[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
